parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor SalesClerk
participant "<<presentation>>\nDefineNewCategoryUI" as UI

SalesClerk --> UI : 1 Define new category
activate UI
UI --> SalesClerk : 2 asks user information
SalesClerk --> UI : 3 Code, Description
UI --> SalesClerk : 4 displayCategoryInfo
deactivate UI
@enduml
```
